title: Aura Lily
description: Adds a flower that converts Aura from Natures Aura into Mana from Botania
body:
[![Bisect Hosting Link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8a5f8695-7e4f-42ee-aff9-a44f49663696.png)](https://shorturl.at/xbl6X)


This mod only adds a single thing, which is the Aura Lily. The Aura Lily takes in Aura from Natures Aura, and converts it into Mana from Botania. The conversion rate for the flower is configurable!


This mod was made due to a request by soundgoodizerfan on Discord.
